# Work Graph reference

## Reference role
This page is the **reference role** companion to the canonical user journey, [Work Graph: follow relationships](views/work-graph.md). It keeps only shared reference context so the user journey remains the single walkthrough.

## What the reference covers
The Work Graph links evidence across issues, pull requests, commits, and files. It preserves relationship context and source caveats so a pattern can lead back to inspectable work.

## Use the canonical journey
For current versus planned behavior and the evidence path, use [Work Graph: follow relationships](views/work-graph.md). For terminology, see the [glossary](glossary.md).
